attributes.action: AI generated images/videos should legally state they use AI on social media
attributes.additional_details:
Prevents disinformation, particularly for significant/sensitive topics and people who may otherwise believe AI-generated media. 

It also means the creators of the videos and images have responsibility over what they are sharing.
attributes.background: Every video or image posted on social media that is AI-generated should have to legally state that it is AI.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Mandate labelling of Al-generated videos in metadata and online
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747437
